person.name: Walter de Moravia
person.alternateName: Walter de Moravia Lord of Petyn
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Walter was the son of William Moravia.

1226: Two agreements with Andrew, Bishop of Moray concerning property dispositions after the death of his father.
1235: Agreement with Andrew, Bishop of Moray concerning the the churchland of 'Ewen'.
1235: Accompanied Alexander II to England.
1244: "apparently the year of his death"

He Had issue:

1.) Sir William Murray of Petty

zh.Bothwell Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Moravia於大約1185年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，他的父親William de Moravia of Petty22歲，母親Filia De Olifand15歲。他和FitzDuncan至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1244年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.Bothwell Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Moravia于大约1185年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，他的父亲William de Moravia of Petty22岁，母亲Filia De Olifand15岁。他和FitzDuncan至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1244年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Moravia was born about 1185, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William de Moravia of Petty, was 22 and his mother, Filia De Olifand, was 15. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with FitzDuncan. He died in 1244, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Moravia est né environ 1185, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Moravia of Petty, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Filia De Olifand, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec FitzDuncan. Il est décédé en 1244, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Moravia um 1185 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Moravia of Petty 22 und seine Mutter Filia De Olifand 15. Er hatte mit FitzDuncan mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Moravia è nato il circa 1185 nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Moravia of Petty, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Filia De Olifand, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con FitzDuncan. Morì nel 1244, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Moraviaが約1185年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父William de Moravia of Pettyは22歳，母Filia De Olifandは15歳であった。彼はFitzDuncanとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1244年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Moravia(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Moravia of Petty(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Filia De Olifand(은)는 15세였다. 그는 FitzDuncan(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bothwell Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland: Bothwell, Lanerk, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Moravia nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Moravia of Petty, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Filia De Olifand, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com FitzDuncan. Ele faleceu em 1244, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Moravia родился около 1185 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Moravia of Petty было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Filia De Olifand, 15. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от FitzDuncan. Он умер в 1244 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Moravia nació aproximadamente 1185, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Moravia of Petty, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Filia De Olifand, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con FitzDuncan. Murió en 1244, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
